title: Terracraft
description: Minecraft how you have never experienced before. A minimalistic modpack focused on visual enhancements, performance and Create support.
body:
# Experience a New Era of Minecraft

Discover a groundbreaking Fabric-based modpack that blends stunning visuals, advanced mechanics, and smooth performance to redefine your Minecraft adventure. This modpack focuses on bringing together the most stunning mods for visual enhancements and Create.

![Iris + Create + Distant Horizons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88492120f2a439e3fd7a18d2a8131f999fc48023.png)

Elevate your Minecraft experience with a modpack that fuses stunning graphics, innovative automation, and uncompromising performance. Dive into a world where every block, mechanic, and landscape detail is designed to create an adventure unlike any other.

---

## Graphics & Visuals

- **Enhanced Render Distance:**  
  Enjoy vastly increased render distances with **Distant Horizons** that transform your exploration experience.

- **Shader Variety:**  
  Choose from multiple pre-configured shader packs:  
  - **Bliss:** For ultra-photorealistic visuals.  
  - **Complementary Reimagined:** Offers a beautifully refined vanilla aesthetic.  
  - **Rethinking Voxels:** Focuses on path tracing and realistic shadows.

- **PBR Texture Packs:**  
  Experience blocks rendered with lifelike detail that perfectly complement the shader options.


## Full Create Mod Support

- **Dynamic Mechanics:**  
  Immerse yourself in new automation and mechanics courtesy of the **Create** mod, making complex constructions and processes intuitive.

- **Enhanced Transportation:**  
  Navigate your world with:
  - **Airships (Immersive Aircrafts):** Seamlessly integrated with Create mechanics for a unique crafting experience.
  - **Ships (Small Ships):** Maintain a classic feel while expanding your transportation options.


## Realism & Quality-of-Life Improvements

- **Immersive Realism:**  
  Enjoy a more authentic survival experience with added systems like **Thirst** and **Temperature**, bringing an extra layer of challenge and immersion.

- **User-Friendly Tools:**  
  Quality-of-life mods such as **NEI**, **Journey Map**, and **Inventory Tweaks** streamline gameplay without overwhelming the classic Minecraft charm.

- **Reworked Terrain:**  
  With **Lithosphere**, explore landscapes featuring higher mountain ranges, deeper valleys, and more realistic terrain generation.


## Optimized Performance

Every mod is meticulously selected and tweaked to ensure:
- **Seamless Integration:** A vanilla-like look and feel that respects Minecraft’s original design.
- **Smooth Gameplay:** Robust optimization mods that keep your game running effortlessly even as you push the visual boundaries.

---

## Multiplayer Support
This modpack was build with multiplayer in mind. Each release includes a pre-configured server release file that includes all required server side mods and additional optimizations and tools (e.g. chunky). To run the server, extract the server file to your Minecraft Server directory. The release file also includes a bash script that automatically downloads and runs the latest fabric server executable.

---

## Known Issues

- Using the Bliss shader can sometimes lead to smearing / dublication in the skybox. To fix this disable and enable Distant Horizon in the settings or restart the game.

## Important Notes

- It is highly recommended to run the server on a seperat device due to performance reason. A high frequency CPU with at least 8 cores and at least 24GB of memory is recommended.
- When running the server, use chunky to pregenerate chunks and Distant Horizon LoDs, so players can take full advantage of Distant Horizon even in mutiplayer sessions.
- When using other shaders make sure to increate the cloud height to at least 300, since mountains ranges will have a height of up to y=500.
- If running on lower end hardware, it is recommended to use the pre-configured version of Complementary shaders or disable shaders all togehter. In addition try and avoid playing at higher resolutions as this will drastically affect your FPS.

---

## Credits
The following mods have been included from external sources:

- [Create Immersive Aircrafts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack): nicky__21
- [Create Immersive Aircraft - Warship](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircraft-warship): crazyfl_
